questions.question: What is the purpose of a stem-and-leaf plot in sports statistics?

options.C: To show the distribution of scores
options.D: To rank players by distance run

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of using a stem-and-leaf plot to analyze marathon finishing times?

options.A: Easy to compare with other sports
options.B: Difficult to interpret for large datasets
options.C: Allows for quick identification of outliers

questions.question: A basketball player scored the following points in 5 games: $12, 15, 20, 18, 22$. Which stem-and-leaf plot represents these scores?
The stem-and-leaf plot below represents the $100m$ dash times (in seconds) for a group of sprinters: $9 | 5 8 9, 10 | 1 2 5$. Which of the following statements is true about the data?

options.E: There is an outlier at $10.2$ seconds

questions.question: A golfer's scores for 7 rounds are: $75, 72, 80, 78, 85, 76, 82$. What is the stem of the score $82$ in a stem-and-leaf plot?
Which type of data is best represented by a stem-and-leaf plot?
What does the leaf represent in a stem-and-leaf plot of tennis serve speeds (in $mph$)?

options.A: The ones digit of the speed
options.B: The tens digit of the speed
options.C: The hundreds digit of the speed

questions.question: The stem-and-leaf plot below displays the times (in minutes) it took for a group of cyclists to complete a race: $2 | 5 8, 3 | 1 4 9$. How many cyclists completed the race in under $3$ minutes?
Create a stem-and-leaf plot for the following basketball scores: $18, 22, 20, 25, 30, 28, 19$. Use the stem as the tens digit and the leaf as the ones digit.

The times (in seconds) for a $400m$ dash are given below. Create a stem-and-leaf plot and interpret the distribution of the times: $48, 52, 50, 55, 58, 49, 53$. Use the stem as the tens digit and the leaf as the ones digit.

teacher_rules: Provide a variety of real-world examples to illustrate the importance of stem-and-leaf plots in sports statistics.
Encourage students to use technology, such as graphing calculators or software, to create and analyze stem-and-leaf plots.
Emphasize the importance of accurate and precise calculations when creating and interpreting stem-and-leaf plots.
